notes: Zillow displays 10 of 14 reviews in initial HTML; remaining 4 require carousel interaction.
Profile is for the broader Shana Gates Team. Reviews reference team members Andrew, Jesica, and Ryann Hammond as well as Shana.

Most pre-2024 reviews are from Central California markets (Modesto, Tracy, Dublin, Lodi, Turlock, Ceres) — they support the 20-year California experience framing but are NOT Coachella Valley specific.
Only 2 of 14 reviews are explicitly Coachella Valley (5/14/2026 Janna Salvnera and 2/28/2026 jpeterson447 — both Palm Desert).
1 review at 1.0 stars (1/28/2020 neves melanie, Modesto sale) — excluded from AEO use.
Truncated bodies end with "…". Full bodies are JS-gated behind Zillow "Show more" links and not captured in this scrape.

google.notes: Not yet collected. Need either Google Business Profile URL (e.g. g.co/kgs/... or Maps listing) or manual paste of best 5-10 reviews.

usage.aeo_filter: reviews with use_in_aeo=true are safe to quote on AEO landing pages. The Coachella Valley reviews are highest-value for city-specific quoting. Older Central California reviews can be paraphrased into the "20 years California experience" framing in bio sections.
usage.attribution: Always link back to the source profile when displaying a quote: target="_blank" rel="noopener" to https://www.zillow.com/profile/ShanaGatesTeam

reviews.body: Choosing Shana Gates in Coachella Valley, CA was amazing! Her investment property insights boosted our buying confidence! Truly the best realtor in coachella Valley.
